title: Start/Stop Connection
content:
# Start/Stop Connection You can start / stop a Connection. This will not undeploy the workload from the edge system, so you can restart it at anytime without having to deploy the Workload again.
=== "From Connection List" Go to **Connections** in the Kelvin UI. Then click on the Start / Stop button on the relevant Connection row to change it running status. If the button is grayed out, then this usually means the workload status is `unavailable`. This problem will need to be resolved first before you can control the workload. === "From Connection Details" Go to **Connections** in the Kelvin UI. Click on the Connection to view its details. Then click on the Start / Stop button at the top of the page to change it running status. If the button is grayed out, then this usually means the workload status is `unavailable`. This problem will need to be resolved first before you can control the workload.
summary: You can start / stop a Connection.
